description: Shape should avoid over-shaping a clear small bug and route it directly to focused execution.

weak: Over-shapes a clear small bug into a large planning artifact or routes it to Ship unnecessarily.
Introduces human blockers or extra decisions that do not materially affect safe execution.
good: Recognizes the bug is already PPP-ready and routes it to focused execution with proof still visible.
Preserves a clear first-PR boundary without unnecessary ceremony.
excellent: Makes the route decisively obvious, keeps proof visible, and avoids all unnecessary shaping friction.
Shows that it can distinguish between work that needs shaping and work that only needs disciplined execution.

criteria.name: route-to-focused-execution
criteria.description: Routes a clear small bug to PPP or PPP Cloud rather than Ship.

criteria.name: avoid-ship-on-clear-bug
criteria.description: Penalize routing a clear small bug to Ship.

criteria.name: no-unnecessary-human-block
criteria.description: Penalize manufacturing a human-decision blocker for a normal small bug fix.

criteria.name: keeps-first-pr-visible
criteria.description: Still keeps first-PR or focused-scope framing visible.
